working_on.phase: 🎉 All 11 phases COMPLETE. Module ready for production beta.
working_on.summary: Phase 11 done: PromptInjectionGuardPipe, SanitizeInputPipe, 5 DB indexes, Dockerfile upgrade, graceful shutdown.

recent_changes: PromptInjectionGuardPipe: 12 regex patterns for LLM prompt injection detection
SanitizeInputPipe: strip HTML/script tags, XSS prevention
Applied pipes to chat, test-chat, human-reply endpoints
5 DB indexes created: conversations, messages, customers, channel_connections, knowledge_chunks
